name: S1E6 六一盲盒寻宝
desc: 六一限定 · 陷阱猎人版 · 易错陷阱 20 题（词汇 5 + 地标语法 12 + 综合 3）· 纯初二及以上

m5.q: Blind boxes are so ___ that I just can't stop opening them.
m5.why: 描述事物“令人……”用 -ing 形容词→interesting；interested 描述人“感到……”，主语是 boxes（物）不能用；interest 是名词/动词，interestingly 是副词不能作表语。

m5.q: It was ___ a rare card that the whole class wanted it.
m5.why: 后接 a＋形＋名（a rare card）用 such；so 后只跟形容词（so rare a card 才行）；very 不引导 that 从句，too 表“太…以致不能”。

m5.q: I've ___ over 500 yuan on these toys this year alone.
m5.why: 人作主语花钱用 spend...on→spent；cost 主语是物，pay 要 pay for sth，take 用于 it takes sb time to do。

m5.q: Sadly, ___ collectors can ever afford the diamond edition — almost none.
m5.why: collectors 可数复数＋句末 almost none 提示否定→few（几乎没有）；a few 是肯定“有一些”，little/a little 修饰不可数。

m5.q: The resale price has ___ sharply since the toy sold out.
m5.why: 价格“上涨”是自动行为，rise 不及物（rise-rose-risen），现在完成 has risen；raised 是及物“提高某物”需宾语，rose 不能跟 has，aroused 词义错。

m5.q: More than half of China's diamonds ___ from this very city.
m5.why: half of＋名词谓语随 of 后名词：diamonds 复数→come；被 half 迷惑用单数 comes 是最大坑。

m5.q: In fact, diamonds ___ here since the 1950s.
m5.why: 钻石是“被发现”的＋since the 1950s→现在完成被动 have been found；have found 漏了被动（钻石不会自己找）。

m5.q: The book town, ___ opened in 2019, draws crowds of children.
m5.why: 逗号隔开的非限定性定语从句关系词用 which；that 绝不用于非限定，it 缺连词，what 不引导定语从句。

m5.q: Children here ___ ever since the library first opened.
m5.why: ever since...opened 强调动作持续到现在→现在完成进行 have been reading；have read 强调结果，此处强调持续过程。

m5.q: — Where's Tom? — He ___ to the island; he'll be back next week.
m5.why: 人现在不在、下周才回→has gone to（去了没回）；has been＝去过已回来，与 he'll be back 矛盾，是最大坑。

m5.q: This famous beach is really worth ___ in summer.
m5.why: 固定结构 be worth＋doing（值得做）→visiting；worth 后不接不定式 to visit。

m5.q: The old town ___ more than 1,000 years ago.
m5.why: ago 锁过去＋古城“被建造”→一般过去被动 was built；has been built 完成时不与 ago 连用是坑，built 漏被动。

m5.q: The ancient tower here ___ for centuries, strong as ever.
m5.why: stand（矗立）是不及物动词没有被动＋strong as ever 提示至今→has stood；has been stood 看似高级被动实则不及物不能被动，是全卷最大陷阱。

m5.q: They say a 40-stop metro ___ here — impossible for such a small city!
m5.why: 地铁是“被建”＋情态动词 can→情态被动 can be built；can build 是主动（地铁不会自己建）。

m5.q: This little city doesn't have a subway, ___?
m5.why: 陈述句否定（doesn't have）→反义疑问用肯定 does it（前否后肯）；doesn't it 重复否定，is it/has it 助动词不对应。

m5.q: If this aquarium ___ real, the whole country ___ about it by now.
m5.why: 馆是假的，与现在事实相反的虚拟语气：if 从句 were，主句 would＋原形；is;will know 是真实条件句，was 虚拟须用 were，were;knew 主句缺 would。

m5.q: Honestly, nobody knows ___.
m5.why: knows 后宾语从句用陈述语序 where it is；where is it 保留疑问语序是最常见错误。

m5.q: Your chance of pulling the secret one is just one ___ 144.
m5.why: “N 分之一的概率”固定 one in N（one in 144）；to 用于比分（2 to 1），of/by 搭配错。

m5.q: A diamond box costs about three times ___ a normal one.
m5.why: 倍数表达 times＋as...as，cost 钱（不可数概念）用 as much as；as many as 用于可数，more as 应为 more than。

m5.q: It was not ___ I opened the very last box ___ I finally got the diamond edition.
m5.why: It was not until...that... 是强调“直到……才……”的固定框架，第二空只能用 that；when/then 都破坏强调句结构。
